name: On This Day
description: Fetch the official Wikimedia On This Day feed for a given date, then turn it into a polished daily history brief or a refined macOS-style web app.
short_description: Daily history brief, feed helper, and macOS-style web app.
audience: Readers who want a source-linked same-day history brief
Builders refining the matching macOS-style browser app
Daily context workflows that need deterministic Wikimedia feed snapshots
detail_lines: Uses the official Wikimedia On This Day feed for date-specific events, births, deaths, and holidays instead of inventing facts.
Supports concise briefs, JSON snapshots, and the repo-native macOS-style web app flow.
Keeps source links and timezone basis explicit, with no hidden account access or private browsing history collection.
